titleStmt.title: SII 16.195: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 195. (A.R. No. 410 of 1904.) KOSINĒPALLE, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up opposite to the Āñjanēya temple.
The details of the date viz., Śaka 1476, Ānanda, Śrāvaṇa śu. 2, Tuesday, regularly correspond to 1554 A.D., July 31, °53.

It records a gift of the tyāgavarttana collected by them from the mahājanās of Kosinēpalle alias Harihararāyapuram, a sarvamānya agrahāra situated in Chernūrusīma, for the cherapu-tirunāḷu (i.e., s11iṟapput-tīrunāḷ) festival to god Tiruveṅgaḷanātha of Kōna by a number of Vipravinōdins.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrastu . niraṁ
tarāyōstu .
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1476 Agu
nēṁṭi Ānaṁda saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa śu 2 ma . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāsivadēva mahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārū
ḍhuṁḍai pṛthvīsāmrājyaṁ sēyaṁgānu cenū�ri sīmaku cellē kosanepalleku prati
nāmamaina harihararāyapuraṁ sarvamānyaAgrahāraṁ purāṇapuruṣōttamu
ḍaina kōna tiruveṁgaḷanāthaniki vipravinōdulu kāsyapagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ
yejuśśākhādhyāyulaina pedakēśavayyaṁgāri pautṛlaina kēśavayyaṁgāri
putṛlu cannaya lakṣmaya sidayaṁgārunnu tadgōtraṁ tatsūtraṁ tatśākhādhyāyulai
na praḷayakāla gōviṁddagiri pautṛlaina rudraya putṛlaina gōviṁddayatirāja
yyaṁgāruṁnnu vasiṣṭagōtraṁ Āpastaṁba sūtraṁ yajuśśākhādhyāyulaina gōviṁdaya
gāri pautṛlaina rācaya putṛṁḍaina gōviṁdayānu Ā vallabhaya pautṛlaina vīraya pu
tṛḍu vallabhayānu Ā mallayya pautṛlaina liṁgaya putṛlu tammayānu dharmayānu Ā liṁ
gaya pautṛṁḍaina vīraya putṛṁḍu nalagōviṁdayānu Ā liṁgaya pautṛṁḍaina liṁgaya pu
tṛlu vīrayānu mallayānu kosanēpalle mahājanālu vipravinōdulakiccē tyā
gavartanalu . kōnatiruveṁgaḷanāthani cerapu tirunāḷaku sarvamānyaṁgānu mā
kulasvāmulaina vipravinōdulakellā puṇyaṁgānu samarpiṁci Iccina dharmaśāsanaṁ .
yī dharmānaku yavvaru tappinānu tama tallidaṁḍṟlanuṁnnu gōbrāhmalanuṁnnu vāraṇā
silō vadhiṁcina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru kukkapunukalō kākimāṁsamu suratō
kalapukatinna pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu
pālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 16.195 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
